description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Save the cheapest seated ticket for a Berlin concert in September 2025
tasks.description: Find a tour date in Berlin, Germany during September 2025 and save the cheapest available seated ticket option for that show. Success is having exactly one seated ticket option for a Berlin September 2025 show saved or favorited.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage using the main URL.
In the main navigation bar, click on the 'Tour' or 'Live Shows' section.
On the tour page, use the location filter field to type 'Berlin' and apply the filter so that only Berlin shows are listed.
Use the date or month filter to select 'September 2025' so only Berlin shows in that month are displayed.
From the filtered Berlin shows in September 2025, click on the tour date with the earliest calendar date in that month to open its event details page.
On the event details page, locate the ticket options list and set the sort control to 'Price: Low to High'.
From the sorted ticket options, identify the first option that is explicitly labeled as 'Seated' and click it to select that seating category.

In the quantity field for this seated ticket option, enter '1' and then click the 'Save Ticket', 'Add to Favorites', or similar button to save this specific seated ticket choice for that Berlin September 2025 show.

tasks.name: Create a 4-track playlist of acoustic songs released between 2018 and 2022
tasks.description: Build a new playlist containing exactly 4 acoustic tracks released between 2018 and 2022 from the artist's discography. Success is having a playlist named 'Acoustic 2018-22' with 4 qualifying songs added in order from the filtered list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Music' or 'Discography' section in the main navigation.
On the discography page, use the content type filters to switch the view to 'Songs' or 'Tracks' rather than albums.
Use the filter controls to set the release year range so that only tracks released from 2018 through 2022 (inclusive) are shown.
Apply a genre or style filter by selecting 'Acoustic' from the available genre, mood, or style options.
Use the sorting control to sort the resulting acoustic tracks by release date from newest to oldest.
From the top of the filtered list, select the first 4 tracks that appear and click the checkbox or 'Add to playlist' control for each one.
In the playlist dialog or panel that appears, create a new playlist by entering the name 'Acoustic 2018-22' into the playlist name field.
Confirm the creation of the new playlist and assign all 4 selected tracks to this 'Acoustic 2018-22' playlist using the 'Save' or 'Create Playlist' button.

tasks.name: Add a T-shirt and hoodie to cart with 4+ star ratings and a combined total of $80 or less
tasks.description: From the merch store, add one T-shirt and one hoodie, both size M, each rated at least 4 stars, with their combined prices totaling no more than $80. Success is having exactly 2 items in the cart (1 T-shirt and 1 hoodie, both size M) whose combined price is $80 or less.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Store' or 'Merch' link in the main navigation to open the merchandise section.
In the store sidebar or category menu, select the 'Clothing' category and then choose the 'T-Shirts' subcategory.
Within the T-shirt listings, set the rating filter to '4 stars & up' and the sorting option to 'Price: Low to High'.
From the filtered T-shirts, identify the first T-shirt priced at $40 or less and click on its product image or name to open the product details page.
On the T-shirt product page, select size 'M' from the size options, set the quantity field to '1', and click the 'Add to Cart' button.
Use the store navigation or breadcrumb to return to the 'Clothing' category and then select the 'Hoodies & Sweatshirts' subcategory.
In the hoodies list, again set the rating filter to '4 stars & up' and the sorting option to 'Price: Low to High'.

From the hoodie results, look for hoodies whose individual prices keep the combined total of the previously added T-shirt plus this hoodie at $80 or below; among those, choose the hoodie with the highest rating, and if multiple have the same highest rating, choose the cheapest one and open its product page.
On the selected hoodie product page, choose size 'M', set the quantity to '1', and click 'Add to Cart' to complete the cart with both clothing items.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the artist newsletter with weekly updates and 3 specific interests
tasks.description: Sign up for the artist's email newsletter using a specified email address, selecting weekly frequency and at least three content interests. Success is submitting the subscription form with email 'fan@example.com', weekly frequency, and a minimum of three distinct interest topics selected.
steps: From any page, locate and click the 'Newsletter', 'Stay Updated', or 'Sign Up' link, either in the header, footer, or a promotional banner.
On the newsletter signup page, click into the email field and type 'fan@example.com'.
Fill in the first name field with 'Jordan' and the last name field with 'River' if those fields are available.
In the country or region dropdown, select 'United States', and in any available city or location field, type 'Chicago'.
In the content preferences or interests section, select at least three different topics such as 'New Releases', 'Tour Announcements', and 'Behind-the-Scenes' (or the closest available equivalents).
Locate the email frequency options and choose 'Weekly' as the preferred frequency.
If there is a checkbox for accepting terms or privacy policy, click to check it.
Click the 'Subscribe', 'Sign Up', or equivalent button to submit the completed newsletter subscription form with the chosen preferences.

tasks.name: Favorite the better album by track count under 60 minutes from 2015–2023
tasks.description: Compare two studio albums released between 2015 and 2023 and choose the one that has more tracks while keeping its total duration under 60 minutes. Success is having that chosen album marked as a favorite.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Music' or 'Discography' section to view the artist's albums.
Use the filters to show only 'Studio Albums' and set the release year range from 2015 to 2023.
Sort the filtered albums by release date from newest to oldest and select any two albums from this range by clicking each album cover to open its album details in turn.
On the first selected album's detail page, note the total number of tracks and the total album duration displayed, then use the browser or site navigation to go back to the album list.
Open the second selected album's detail page, and similarly note its total track count and total duration.

Based on the displayed information, determine which of the two albums has a greater number of tracks while also having a total duration of less than 60 minutes; if both meet the duration requirement, choose the one with more tracks, and if both have the same track count under 60 minutes, choose the more recent release.
Navigate back to the chosen album's detail page by clicking its title or cover from the album list.
On that chosen album page, click the 'Favorite', 'Add to Favorites', or heart icon to mark this album as a favorite.

tasks.name: Add a post-2023 live video over 5 minutes with 10,000+ views to Watch Later
tasks.description: Find a live performance video recorded after January 1, 2023 that is at least 5 minutes long and has at least 10,000 views, then add it to a Watch Later list. Success is having exactly one qualifying video added to the Watch Later queue.
steps: From the homepage, click on the 'Videos' or 'Media' section in the main navigation.
Within the videos area, apply a content type filter to show only 'Live Performances' or the closest available live category.
Use the date filter or sort option to show videos from newest to oldest and, if possible, limit to videos uploaded or recorded after January 1, 2023.
Use any duration filter to display only videos that are 5 minutes or longer, or manually identify entries whose listed duration is at least 5:00 minutes.

From the videos that meet the date and duration conditions, scan their view counts and identify one that has at least 10,000 views; if multiple qualify, choose the one with the highest view count and click its thumbnail to open the video detail page or player.
On that video’s page, locate and click the 'Add to Watch Later', 'Save', or similar button associated with the video.
If prompted to choose a list, select the default 'Watch Later' list (or create a list named 'Watch Later' if necessary) and confirm the selection.
Close or minimize the video player page, leaving the selected video stored in the Watch Later list.

tasks.name: Plan an October 2025 mini-tour with 2 shows in different countries using General Admission tickets
tasks.description: Select two tour dates in October 2025 located in two different countries, each with General Admission tickets, and add them to an itinerary or trip planner on the site. Success is having exactly two General Admission events from October 2025 in different countries added to the itinerary.
steps: From the homepage, open the 'Tour' or 'Live Shows' section from the main navigation.
On the tour listing page, use the date filter controls to restrict visible events to the month of 'October 2025'.
Sort the October 2025 events by date from earliest to latest so they appear in chronological order.
From the list, identify a show in one country (for example, the earliest show in 'Germany' or another specific country shown) and click on that event to open its details page.

On that event's page, find the ticket types and select the 'General Admission' option if available, then click the 'Add to Itinerary', 'Plan Trip', or similar button to add this event to your itinerary.
Return to the October 2025 tour list using the site navigation or a 'Back to all dates' link.

From the remaining October 2025 shows, choose an event in a different country than the first selection (for example, if the first was in Germany, choose one in France, Spain, or another distinct country) and open its event details page.
On the second event's page, select the 'General Admission' ticket option and again click the 'Add to Itinerary' or equivalent button so that this second show is also added to your trip plan.

tasks.name: Favorite a 2020 album song with 'midnight' in the title and view its lyrics in Spanish
tasks.description: Locate a song released on a 2020 album that has the word 'midnight' in its title, switch its lyrics view to Spanish, and mark the track as a favorite. Success is having that specific track both favorited and displayed with Spanish lyrics.
steps: From the homepage, navigate to the 'Music' or 'Discography' section.
Use the filters to show albums and limit the release year to 2020 so only 2020 albums are visible.

Open each 2020 album in turn by clicking its cover or title, and in the tracklist, look for a song whose title contains the word 'midnight' (case-insensitive, e.g., 'Midnight Drive', 'after midnight').
Once you find an album that includes a track with 'midnight' in its title, click that track title to open its song detail or lyrics page.
On the song page, locate the lyrics language selector or translation dropdown and change the language setting from the default to 'Spanish'.
Scroll to or interact with the lyrics section so the Spanish version of the lyrics is active.
On the same song page, click the 'Favorite', 'Add to Favorites', or heart icon associated with the track to mark it as a favorite.
Remain on this track’s page with the Spanish lyrics view active and the track favorited as the final state.
